studies.title: Evaluation of the online-based self-help program "Selfapy" for patients with generalized anxiety disorder

_verification.reason: The study explicitly mentions 'Selfapy' in the title and specifies that it is for patients with generalized anxiety disorder, which matches the product description. While the abstract and intervention details are not available, the title provides sufficient evidence to confirm relevance.

_classification.reason: The study title suggests an evaluation of an online self-help program, which is likely observational and real-world in nature. However, due to lack of explicit details on randomization or interventional design, the classification leans towards RWE with moderate confidence.
